steps.title: Use the area formula
steps.content: The area of a rectangle is length times width. Here the length is $42$ centimeters and the width is $38$ centimeters.

steps.title: Multiply the dimensions
steps.content: Compute $$ 42\cdot 38=1{,}596 $$ The area is $1{,}596$ square centimeters. The answer is D.
